📚 Wikis & Documentation

Team wikis, handbooks and product docs you own — open source alternatives to Confluence, GitBook and Notion docs.

Popular SaaS in this category

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Alternatives to Confluence

Atlassian's team wiki and knowledge base.

4 alternatives

Alternatives to GitBook

Modern docs platform with Git sync and AI search.

3 alternatives
Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

BookStack

Opinionated team wiki organized as books, chapters and pages.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Wiki.js

Modern wiki engine with Git sync and a rich editor.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Outline

Beautiful team knowledge base with real-time collaboration.

License: BSL 1.1 (source-available) Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Docusaurus

Meta's static site generator for product and developer docs.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

MkDocs

Python static-site generator beloved by ops and infra teams.

License: BSD-2-Clause Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

Other categories you might like

⏱ Time Tracking

Log hours, invoice clients and monitor billable time — open source alternatives to Toggl, Harvest and Clockify.

🟢 Status Pages & Uptime

Public status pages and uptime monitoring on your own domain — open source alternatives to Statuspage and Better Uptime.

📊 Business Intelligence

Dashboards, SQL explorers and embedded analytics — open source alternatives to Tableau, Power BI and Looker.
